name: Spack Environment Create
summary: Create reproducible Spack environments for HPC software stacks.
description: This skill provides a starter spack.yaml and commands for concretizing, installing, and loading a user-owned scientific software environment.

inputs.name: specs
inputs.description: Spack package specs to include in the environment.

inputs.name: compiler
inputs.description: Compiler family and version to target.

outputs.name: spack_environment
outputs.description: A spack.yaml and optional spack.lock for reproducible builds.

tests.description: Run spack env create and spack concretize on a system with Spack configured.
